protocol.name: preflight-check
protocol.objective: Validate all workflow inputs, declared files, and resolved variables before the workflow engine enters the step loop. Collect ALL failures and report them together — never stop at the first.

mandates.mandate: Run ONLY after variable-resolution has completed successfully
Collect all failures into a single report before halting
On any failure: HALT with the appropriate status
Never fabricate, guess, or default missing files

step.title: Verify inputs.required files exist
step.action: For each entry in workflow.yaml inputs.required: resolve its path (it is already resolved by variable-resolution) and verify the file exists on disk
If a required input file is missing: record failure category "missing_required_input" with the input ID and expected path

step.title: Verify inputs.optional files (non-failing)
step.action: For each entry in workflow.yaml inputs.optional: check existence but do not fail if missing. Record which optional inputs are present for the engine's downstream logic.

step.title: Verify checklist.md if declared
step.action: If workflow.yaml declares a checklist file path, verify it exists

step.title: Verify template.md if declared
step.action: If workflow.yaml declares a template file path, verify it exists

step.title: Verify all resolved variables are non-empty
step.action: For every variable resolved in variable-resolution, verify its value is non-empty
If empty: record failure category "empty_resolved_variable" with the variable name

step.title: Verify gates.pre_start conditions are readable
step.action: For each pre_start gate declared in workflow.yaml, verify the gate's check descriptor is readable (the gate-enforcer will actually run them later)
If a gate's check field is missing or malformed: record failure category "malformed_pre_start_gate"

step.title: Halt on failures or proceed
step.action: If any failures were recorded in steps 1-6: HALT with status halted_missing_file (if any missing-file failure) or halted_unresolved_variable (if any empty-variable failure) or halted_preflight_gate_malformed (if any gate descriptor failure). Report ALL failures in the halt message, not just the first.
If no failures: return success and proceed to step 7 of the workflow engine (pre-start gate enforcer)
